goal: general_monomial_fn(c, f, n, x) = c * f(x).pow(n)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Nat) { x0 * x1(x2).pow(x3) = general_monomial_fn(x0, x1, x3, x2) }(c, f, x, n)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Nat) { x0(x1).pow(x2) = pointwise_pow(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, n)

goal: const_mul_left(c, pointwise_pow(f, n), x) = c * pointwise_pow(f, n, x)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1(x2) = const_mul_left(x0, x1, x2) }(c, pointwise_pow(f, n), x)

goal: const_mul_left(c, pointwise_pow(f, n), x) = c * f(x).pow(n)
general_monomial_fn(c, f, n, x) = const_mul_left(c, pointwise_pow(f, n), x)
